calls.prompt_preview: Topic: Visiting Ljubljana CEFR Level: A2 Language: Slovene (sl)  ## Committed Pl
calls.response:
For a beginner at the A2 level in Slovene, we'll start with the basics of arrival and greetings in Ljubljana. Here's a 3-day plan to get you started:
```json
{
  "days": [
    {
      "day": 1,
      "title": "Arrival in Ljubljana",
      "focus": "Basic greetings and introductions",
      "collocations": ["Živijo", "Kako si?", "Dobro bom", "Kje je?", "Hvala"],
      "learning_objective": "Use basic greetings and ask for directions",
      "story_guidance": "You arrive at Ljubljana's bus station and need to ask for directions to your hotel"
    },
    {
      "day": 2,
      "title": "Checking into a Hotel",
      "focus": "Hotel check-in and basic phrases",
      "collocations": ["Ime", "Priimek", "Telefonska številka", "Koliko stane?", "Kreditna kartica"],
      "learning_objective": "Check into a hotel using basic Slovene phrases",
      "story_guidance": "You arrive at your hotel and need to check in, providing your personal details"
    },
    {
      "day": 3,
      "title": "Exploring Ljubljana",
      "focus": "Asking for recommendations and directions",
      "collocations": ["Kaj vredno ogleda?", "Kako pridem?", "Kje je bližja pekarna?", "Ali lahko plačam z gotovino?", "Super, hvala"],
      "learning_objective": "Ask for recommendations and directions to explore Ljubljana",
      "story_guidance": "You want to explore Ljubljana and ask your hotel receptionist for recommendations on what to see and do"
    }
  ]
}
```
This plan should give you a solid foundation in basic Slovene phrases to help you navigate your visit to Ljubljana. Let me know if you have any questions or need further adjustments!

calls.prompt_preview: Topic: Visiting Ljubljana CEFR Level: A2 Language: Slovene (sl)  ## Committed Pl
calls.response:
Now that we've covered the basics, let's move on to more advanced vocabulary for days 4-6. For these days, we'll focus on restaurant and shopping vocabulary to help you navigate everyday situations in Ljubljana.

```json
{
  "days": [
    {
      "day": 4,
      "title": "Dining in Ljubljana",
      "focus": "Ordering food at a restaurant",
      "collocations": ["Jedilnik", "Naročam", "Voda", "Kava", "Račun", "Plačilomatiske kartice"],
      "learning_objective": "Order food and drinks at a restaurant using Slovene phrases",
      "story_guidance": "You're at a traditional Slovene restaurant and want to order a meal"
    },
    {
      "day": 5,
      "title": "Shopping in Ljubljana",
      "focus": "Shopping phrases and vocabulary",
      "collocations": ["Cena", "Popust", "Denar", "Kartica", "Vračilo", "Zmenek"],
      "learning_objective": "Use Slovene phrases to shop and ask for prices",
      "story_guidance": "You're at a market in Ljubljana and want to buy some souvenirs"
    },
    {
      "day": 6,
      "title": "Asking for Help",
      "focus": "Asking for assistance and giving directions",
      "collocations": ["Izvinite", "Kje je najbližje", "Levo", "Desno", "Naprej", "Nazaj"],
      "learning_objective": "Ask for help and give directions using Slovene phrases",
      "story_guidance": "You're lost in Ljubljana and need to ask someone for directions"
    }
  ]
}
```
